name: Visual Novel
description: A complete visual novel engine with dialogue scripting, branching choices, character portraits, background switching, and a save/load system. Story content is driven by a simple JSON-based script format.
features: JSON-driven dialogue scripting with speaker, text, and commands
Branching choices that affect story flow
Typewriter text reveal with configurable speed
Character portrait display with position and expression
Save/load game state to user filesystem

text_speed.description: Seconds per character for typewriter effect

auto_advance_delay.description: Seconds to wait in auto mode before advancing

default_transition.description: Default background transition type (fade, dissolve, cut)

text_box_opacity.description: Opacity of the dialogue text box background
